title: Recovered appeal: Great Sike Road, Old Malton, Malton, YO17 6SB (ref: 3342002 - 25 February 2025)
body: "Decision letter and Inspector’s Report for a recovered appeal for the installation and operation of a solar farm and battery energy storage system with associated infrastructure including substation, access tracks, pole mounted CCTV, fencing and landscaping for a period of 40 years. "
